NAME: humanG1Kv37
SOURCE: the 1000 Genomes Project Phase I and III, Broad Institute
DESCRIPTION: GRCh37-based reference FASTA distributed by the 1000 Genomes Project (human_g1k_v37): chromosomes 1-22, X, Y, MT, plus GL unlocalized/unplaced contigs, without separate haplotype scaffolds or EBV. Commonly used as the Phase 1/III alignment reference when harmonizing with public 1KG VCFs and phase panels.
